title: hesperis supina
intro: Hesperis supina, also known as the Dittany or Evening Star, is a flowering plant that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Hesperis supina include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and act as an antiviral agent. Hesperis supina can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used topically in the form of a salve or ointment.
